scripts.hostinger:install: npm --prefix Server ci --omit=dev && npm --prefix Frontend/meitupaints ci --include=dev
scripts.hostinger:build: npm run hostinger:install && npm --prefix Frontend/meitupaints run build
scripts.package:hostinger: npm --prefix Frontend/meitupaints run build && node scripts/create-hostinger-zip.mjs
scripts.check: node --check server.js && npm --prefix Server run check && npm --prefix Frontend/meitupaints run build
